title: Regolamenti dwar id-Drittijiet għas-Servizzi Veterinarji u tal-Biċċerija

description: Official text from legislation.mt (eli/sl/35.10/mlt, expression eli/sl/35.10/20100722/mlt).

provisions.title: u 407 tal-2007; u l-Att XIII tal-2015
provisions.content: It-titolu ta’ dawn ir-regolamenti hu Regolamenti dwar idDrittijiet g]as-Servizzi Veterinarji u tal-Bi``erija.

provisions.title: Titolu
provisions.content:
Id-drittijiet spe`ifikati fl-Iskeda ta’ hawn ta]t g]andhom
jit]allsu lid-Direttur tas-Servizzi Veterinarji g]ad-diversi partiti li
g]alihom japplikaw.

Drittijiet.

A.L. 407 tal-2007.
